title: Update Google Apps Script webhook URL

requirements.summary: Update the booking form submission endpoint to use the new Google Apps Script web app URL
acceptanceCriteria: The BookingForm component posts data to the new Google Apps Script URL
Form submission successfully sends booking data (name, email, phone, date, time, service) to the endpoint
Success and error responses from the Apps Script are handled appropriately

file_operations.description: Update the form submission endpoint URL from the old Google Apps Script URL to the new URL: https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbyNX8QzL8z7as3uaxUlXylX62hNZ4kx7Pt32mQKe9b1HSZCgD0fRgb2CicRVH7qQabvQQ/exec. Preserve existing form validation logic, field handling (name, email, phone, date, time, service), and success/error notification handling.
